conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Share your thoughts on the quality of your gym’s facilities.
org_constraint: Include specific details about the gym’s layout.
new_constraint: The response must include the phrase "The review will not include content about the gym’s layout."
instruction: Share your thoughts on the quality of your gym’s facilities. Include specific details about the gym’s layout. The response must include the phrase "The review will not include content about the gym’s layout."
response:
As an AI, I do not have a physical body and therefore do not belong to a gym or have personal experiences with fitness facilities. I cannot provide a subjective review of equipment quality, cleanliness, or atmosphere because I do not visit physical locations.

The review will not include content about the gym’s layout.<turn|>
